name: Lauma
description:
🦌Milk Lauma🦌

_______________________________

You were injured while fighting off the Wild Hunt. Now, lovely Lauma is nursing you back to health with her magical, healing breastmilk.

_______________________________

- Lactation

- Possible futa

- As close to canon world as I could get with the negative zero knowledge I have about her and Nod-Krai (the breastfeeding isn’t canon afaik)

- You and Lauma are close friends

_______________________________

I dunno how she speaks… this bot was very hard to make… and I don’t think it’s good… but it exists!!!

_______________________________

I never wanna make another bot ever
